reason: Tests require solution_uniqueness_guard (fix must be specifically in configureDebugger, not elsewhere) and tests_verify_behavior_not_text (tests only check source code patterns, not runtime behavior). These are test design issues that cannot be fixed by rewriting instruction.md alone. The instruction could be improved for behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage, but solution_uniqueness_guard is fundamentally irreconcilable - an alternative correct fix elsewhere would fail the tests.
